title: Lange Beine - lange Finger
writer: Peter Lambda, Eberhard Keindorff, Johanna Sibelius
actors: Senta Berger, Joachim Fuchsberger, Martin Held
plot: An English barrister falls for a young Austrian baroness who, together with her father, steals jewelry from ladies' necks by applying her grandmother's so-called "one and a half finger system."
